title: Good in transit misalignment (trading model US10-US50-US98)  - Reference to incident INC5113018
description: Good in transit misalignment (trading model US10-US50-US98)  - Reference to incident INC5113018
symptom: I/C or Intercompany Invoice and corresponding accounting document showing goods receipt amount instead of invoice amount
business_context: User tries to create I/C invoice from the standard invoice by triggering ZZIV output type
root_cause: Copy control routines 636 and 036 considering TVCPF table entry instead of invoice/goods receipt quantity which is what standard SAP code uses.
fix: Added logic to determine invoice amount on the basis of invoice/goods receipt quantity in routine 636 and custom program ZVSAI_RV60AFZZ_PRC_DET_IC since routine 036 is a standard program
